# AWS Repo Well-Architected Advisor — LLM Orientation

## Mission

OpenCode operating system for repository architecture reviews, solution architect discovery, platform design, GitOps/DevSecOps audits, federal-grade evidence-based engineering reviews, and pre-push quality enforcement.

## Major Folders

- `.opencode/` — Control plane: opencode.json, plugins, commands, tools
- `skills/aws-well-architected-pack/` — Core skill pack: 10 modules, scoring, routing
- `schemas/` — review-score.schema.json, command-routing.schema.json
- `docs/` — Operating model, command-to-skill mapping, routing matrix, scoring
- `hooks/` — Pre-push hook for quality gate

## Command Surface

/quick-review, /repo-assess, /solution-discovery, /platform-design, /scaffold, /design-and-implement, /incremental-fix, /federal-checklist, /gitops-audit, /quality-gate, /doc-sync, /verify, /checkpoint, /orchestrate

## Rules and Constraints

- Evidence before claims: findings must have evidence_type (observed, inferred, missing, contradictory)
- Never fabricate compliance
- Quality gate blocks push when NOT_READY and AWS_PACK_ENFORCE_QUALITY_GATE=true
- Do not read .env, secrets, .pem, .key
- All review output must conform to schemas/review-score.schema.json

## Ideal Use Cases

- Repo onboarding assessment
- Pre-production readiness gate
- Federal compliance (NIST, FedRAMP) review
- GitOps/CI/CD audit
- Platform design from requirements
- Design-and-implement: read repo → ask requirements → recommend → generate Terraform/CDK
- Architecture doc sync
